sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Topa aw, kong muang hi, Nangmah bek kong muang hi.
Hih leitung nuntakna, lungmuan omthei lopi;
Uptheih muantheih dingin, lungsim hemlam tam si,
Hih leitung ka nun sung, Topa bek kong muang hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Kei hong sung in, kei hong liah in, ka Honpa aw,
Ka suangpi aw, bit takin na kha liim hong seel aw,
Lungmuanna huang sungah, Tawldamna liim sungah,
Na ang sungah lung muang takin,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Mite muan ding sangin, Topa muan hoihzaw hi;
Amuang mite lampi, Topa'n hu-in keem hi;
Hong paisan ngei lo hi, hong nusia ngei lo hi;
Hih leitung ka nun sung, Topa bek kong muang hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Hong theikhial ngei lo hi, hong telkhial ngei lo hi;
Amah muanna sungah, dotna khempeuh veng hi;
Hong enkhial ngei lo hi, hong hokhial ngei lo hi,
Hih leitung ka nun sung, Topa bek kong muang hi.
